conversations.say: Samira, thank you for setting that boundary. I agree to label all route uncertainty and secure your explicit consent before any personal detail enters my notes.
conversations.offer: I will show my route board with uncertainty labels intact and protect your confidences.
conversations.request: Help me evaluate whether the client-supplied route segment near the printing floor matches Vale's actual movements.

conversations.say: Inez, I accept your fair-treatment terms. I am here for verified neighborhood accounts, not to leave residents holding the risk.
conversations.offer: Complete discretion and strict protection of local source identities against commercial exposure.
conversations.request: Can you introduce me to a witness who saw transit or activity near the printing floor two nights ago?

conversations.say: Rafi, I accept your terms: no customer will be labeled R based on your ledger. Let's look strictly at the transaction continuity.
conversations.offer: A bounded view of my route board timeline near the former printing floor.
conversations.request: Show me the bounded ledger entries for the time Vale entered the neighborhood.

commitments.promise: Review route details with Samira only under strict uncertainty labeling and explicit consent.
Agree not to call any customer R based on transaction records.

goal_progress: Established formal agreement with Samira regarding uncertainty labeling and consent for personal route details.
Accepted Inez's fair-treatment terms for neighborhood witness engagement.
Agreed to Rafi's privacy terms in exchange for bounded transaction continuity records.
reasoning_summary: Engaged Samira, Inez, and Rafi under strict voluntary and confidential terms to test the manufactured route segment and gather local observations without compromising source safety.
